_meta.zoneSource: USDA Plant Hardiness Zone Map 2023 (planthardiness.ars.usda.gov), latitude-band approximation
_meta.frostSource: NOAA NCEI 1991-2020 Climate Normals (ANN-TMIN-PRBLST-T28FP90 + ANN-TMIN-PRBFST-T28FP90), latitude-regression approximation: ±3.5 days per degree from anchor (38.9°N → 04-15 / 10-20)
